description_long: This is an ornate round table accompanied by two matching chairs, all featuring intricate, decorative scrollwork and floral motifs on both the tabletop support and chair backs. The table stands on a single central pedestal that branches into four elegantly curved legs, each adorned with additional ornamental detailing. The chairs have rounded seats and high, openwork backs with swirling patterns, echoing the table's design. The entire set appears to be made of cast metal, likely wrought iron, giving it a sturdy yet refined appearance. The surface finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of outdoor metal furniture. This set is well-suited for placement in a garden, park, or sidewalk café setting.
description: An ornate round metal table with two matching decorative chairs, featuring intricate scrollwork and floral motifs. The set is sturdy and elegant, ideal for outdoor urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with one chair directly in front and another behind, highlighting the decorative chair backs and table edge.
description_view_1: Angled view displaying the round tabletop, both chairs positioned to the sides, and the elaborate pedestal base with curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring view 0, with the chair backs and table edge visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the set.
description_view_3: Side-angled view similar to view 1, showing the ornate base and both chairs, with clear visibility of the scrollwork.
attribute_number_of_legs: central pedestal with four curved legs
